series_metadata.series_description: Case record of children who were recepient of the BCMH program. This record includes running record narrative on actions taken; medical applications, financial applications, copies of 1040's, pay stubs, copies of correspondence from BCMH to parents, hospitals, physicians, etc., copies of medical reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one year in office area. Retain fourteen years in State Records Center., Paper: Shred
